name: megashop
description: Megashop - plataforma e-commerce delivery con MongoDB, Redis, Spring Boot y React.

scripts.dev: npm run infra:up && npm-run-all --parallel dev:backend dev:frontend
scripts.test:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-maven.ps1 -f backend/pom.xml clean test
scripts.build:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/run-maven.ps1 -f backend/pom.xml clean package
